title: ChargePoint Q4 2024 Earnings Report: EPS Beat, Revenue Miss
text: ChargePoint beat earnings expectations, reporting earnings per share of negative 12 cents versus the analyst estimate of negative 13 cents. The company fell short on the top line, generating $115.83 million compared to the projected $119.59 million, approximately 3.14% below forecasts. ChargePoint delivered mixed results in its fourth-quarter showing. While the company exceeded profit expectations on a per-share basis, it underperformed on revenue generation. The narrower-than-expected loss per share may provide some investor reassurance, though the revenue shortfall suggests the electric vehicle charging infrastructure company faces demand or execution challenges. RBC downgraded the shares to sector perform from outperform after the event, while Needham cut its price target to $3 from $4.
